title: mirabilis oligantha
intro: Mirabilis oligantha, also known as the desert four o'clock or desert marigold, is a species of flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to help treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of Mirabilis oligantha include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off bacterial and fungal infections, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Mirabilis oligantha include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
